request_text: Add a date filter to the monthly standard report
rationale: Clause 4.2.1 explicitly includes date and category filters on reports.

request_text: Export the quarterly report as PDF
rationale: Clause 4.2.2 includes PDF export of generated reports.

request_text: Users should be able to reset their password by email
rationale: Clause 3.1 includes password reset functionality.

request_text: Add a new bar chart widget to the management dashboard
rationale: Clause 4.3 includes standard chart and widget components on the dashboard.

request_text: Add a category filter to the standard reports
rationale: Clause 4.2.1 explicitly includes category filters.

request_text: Let users download reports in Excel format
rationale: Clause 4.2.2 includes Excel (xlsx) export.

request_text: Log users out automatically after a period of inactivity
rationale: Clause 3.1 includes session management; an inactivity timeout is session management.

request_text: Show a KPI summary widget on the dashboard
rationale: Clause 4.3 includes standard widget components on the dashboard.

request_text: Improve the password reset flow with a confirmation email step
rationale: Clause 3.1 includes password reset; a confirmation step is a refinement of the included function.

request_text: Generate the standard monthly sales report
rationale: Clause 4.2.1 includes up to 5 standard reports per month.

request_text: Our managers want to download the monthly numbers as a spreadsheet
rationale: Spreadsheet download = Excel export, Clause 4.2.2 — phrased without the words 'export' or 'xlsx'.

request_text: Let us narrow the monthly figures down to a chosen time period
rationale: Narrowing to a time period = date filter, Clause 4.2.1 — no 'filter' keyword.

request_text: When someone forgets their credentials they should be able to regain access on their own
rationale: Self-service credential recovery = password reset, Clause 3.1 — no 'password reset' keyword.

request_text: Add a new visual to the executive overview screen
rationale: Executive overview screen = management dashboard, Clause 4.3.

request_text: We need a printable version of the report for client meetings
rationale: Printable version = PDF export, Clause 4.2.2.

request_text: A sign-out-everywhere button that ends all of a user's active sessions
rationale: Ending active sessions is session management, Clause 3.1.

request_text: Break the standard report down by product category
rationale: Breakdown by category = category filter, Clause 4.2.1.

request_text: A pie chart of open items on the landing dashboard
rationale: A standard chart component on the dashboard, Clause 4.3.

request_text: We need SAML single sign-on with our corporate identity provider
rationale: Clause 7.1 explicitly excludes SSO and third-party IdP (SAML/OAuth) integration.

request_text: Integrate the login with Okta
rationale: Okta is a third-party identity provider — excluded by Clause 7.1.

request_text: Support OAuth login via Google Workspace
rationale: OAuth IdP login is excluded by Clause 7.1.

request_text: Develop an iOS mobile application
rationale: Clause 7.1 excludes mobile application development.

request_text: Build an Android app for the field staff
rationale: Mobile application development is excluded by Clause 7.1.

request_text: Send a push notification when a report is ready
rationale: Clause 7.1 excludes push notifications.

request_text: Stream data to the dashboard in real time over websockets
rationale: Clause 7.1 excludes real-time data streaming.

request_text: Connect to our Azure AD so employees don't need a separate password here
rationale: Corporate directory login = third-party IdP/SSO, excluded by Clause 7.1 — phrased without 'SSO'.

request_text: Our field team wants to use the system natively on their phones
rationale: Native phone use = mobile application, excluded by Clause 7.1 — phrased without 'mobile app'.

request_text: Numbers on the screen should update live without refreshing the page
rationale: Live updates without refresh = real-time streaming, excluded by Clause 7.1.

request_text: Add a dashboard widget that streams live metrics in real time
rationale: Shares 'dashboard/widget' vocabulary with included Clause 4.3, but the deliverable is real-time streaming — excluded by Clause 7.1.

request_text: Send the monthly report to users as a push notification
rationale: Shares 'report' vocabulary with Clause 4.2.1, but the deliverable is a push notification — excluded by Clause 7.1.

request_text: Single sign-on so users can skip the login screen
rationale: Shares 'login' vocabulary with Clause 3.1, but SSO is explicitly excluded by Clause 7.1.

request_text: A mobile app to view the dashboards on the go
rationale: Shares 'dashboard' vocabulary with Clause 4.3, but mobile app development is excluded by Clause 7.1.

request_text: Add multi-tenant support so each subsidiary gets an isolated workspace
rationale: No contract clause covers multi-tenancy — new capability, change request.

request_text: A GDPR tool that lets users download all of their personal data
rationale: No clause covers regulatory data-subject tooling — change request.

request_text: Full-text search across all records
rationale: Search is not in the contract — change request.

request_text: Two-factor authentication with TOTP codes
rationale: Clause 3.1 covers local username/password auth, sessions and password reset; 2FA is a new authentication capability — change request. (Adversarial: strong lexical overlap with the auth clause.)

request_text: Dark mode for the whole interface
rationale: No clause covers theming — change request.

request_text: An audit log screen showing who changed what and when
rationale: No clause covers audit tooling — change request.

request_text: Bulk import of customer data from CSV files
rationale: No clause covers data import — change request.

request_text: Role-based permissions with custom role definitions
rationale: No clause covers an authorization/roles feature — change request.

request_text: Generate e-invoices compliant with local tax regulations
rationale: No clause covers invoicing — change request.

request_text: A public REST API for third-party developers
rationale: No clause covers a public API — change request.

request_text: We need 8 standard reports every month instead of 5
rationale: Clause 4.2.1 caps standard reports at 5 per month; 8 exceeds the contractual limit — change request.

request_text: Support up to 10 concurrent sessions per user
rationale: Clause 3.1 caps concurrent sessions at 3; 10 exceeds the limit — change request.

request_text: We want to integrate with 4 external systems
rationale: Clause 5.1 caps external integrations at 2; 4 exceeds the limit — change request.

request_text: Generate 20 reports monthly covering all departments
rationale: Clause 4.2.1 caps standard reports at 5 per month — change request.

request_text: Connect the system to our SAP ERP
rationale: Integrations are included (Clause 5.1) but pooled at 24 hours; the past ERP integration took 14h and 14h of the pool is already consumed, so a comparable integration exceeds the remaining pool — change request.

request_text: Add an integration with our warehouse management system
rationale: Included by Clause 5.1 but the 24-hour integration effort pool cannot absorb another integration of historical size (14h consumed, ~14h analog) — change request.

request_text: performance
rationale: A single word is not a scoped deliverable; the PMO must clarify.

request_text: reports
rationale: One word overlapping an included clause is not enough evidence for a confident in-scope call.

request_text: Make the reports better
rationale: No concrete deliverable — 'better' could be in-scope filters or an out-of-pool rework; PMO must clarify.

request_text: Improve the dashboard
rationale: Vague: could be an included widget (4.3) or a redesign beyond scope; PMO must clarify.

request_text: Can the system be faster when working with large data?
rationale: Performance work maps to no clause and could be maintenance or a project — needs clarification.

request_text: We need better security
rationale: Vague; overlaps the auth clause lexically but names no deliverable — PMO must clarify.

request_text: The monthly report page crashes with a 500 error
rationale: A defect in delivered functionality — bug-fix maintenance under Clause 8.1.

request_text: The Excel export produces a corrupt file
rationale: Defect in the included export (4.2.2) — maintenance under Clause 8.1.

request_text: Bug: the dashboard chart shows wrong totals
rationale: Defect in delivered dashboard — maintenance under Clause 8.1.

request_text: Users get logged out randomly — looks like a session bug
rationale: Defect in delivered session management (3.1) — maintenance under Clause 8.1.

request_text: The PDF export cuts off the last page of the report
rationale: Defect in the included PDF export — maintenance under Clause 8.1.

request_text: The login button does nothing since the last deployment
rationale: Regression in delivered authentication — maintenance under Clause 8.1.

request_text: SSO entegrasyonu istiyoruz
rationale: Turkish request against the English contract: SSO integration is excluded by Clause 7.1.

request_text: Aylık rapora tarih filtresi eklensin
rationale: Turkish request: date filter on the monthly report — included by Clause 4.2.1.

request_text: Mobil uygulama yapılabilir mi?
rationale: Turkish request: mobile app development is excluded by Clause 7.1.

request_text: Gösterge paneline yeni bir grafik ekleyin
rationale: Turkish request: a new chart on the dashboard — included by Clause 4.3.

request_text: Raporları Excel olarak indirebilelim
rationale: Turkish request: Excel download of reports — included by Clause 4.2.2.

request_text: Kripto para ile ödeme alabilelim
rationale: Turkish request: crypto payments map to no clause in this contract — change request.
